name: Taoist Thunder Magic
description: Taoist Thunder Magic (Lei Fa) is a powerful system of esoteric practices within Taoism, focused on invoking and manipulating the forces of thunder and lightning. Originating during the Song Dynasty, it blends indigenous Chinese shamanistic traditions with Taoist cosmology and ritual. Practitioners, often ordained priests, use complex rituals, incantations, talismans, and visualizations to connect with celestial deities and command thunder spirits. The practice aims to exorcise evil, heal the sick, bring rain, and maintain cosmic balance by harnessing the potent yang energy of thunder. Its cultural significance lies in its role as a protective force against demonic influences and a means of ensuring prosperity and well-being for communities. Thunder Magic is considered a high-level practice requiring years of dedicated study and rigorous training under a qualified master. The efficacy of the magic is believed to stem from the practitioner's moral cultivation and alignment with the Tao.
subtitle: Harnessing the Power of Celestial Thunder

keyMyths.title: Lei Gong's Origins
keyMyths.description: Lei Gong was originally a demon who terrorized humanity but was subdued and transformed by a Taoist immortal into a righteous enforcer of cosmic justice. He now strikes down evildoers with his hammer and chisel.

keyMyths.title: The Thunder Talismans
keyMyths.description: The Thunder Talismans, empowered by celestial energies, are believed to be capable of summoning thunder spirits and directing their power to various ends, such as exorcism and protection.

sources.author: Komjathy, Louis
sources.work: Title: The Way of the Thunder Dragon: A Study of Taoist Thunder Magic
sources.description: An academic study of the history, practices, and theology of Taoist Thunder Magic.
sources.text: An academic study of the history, practices, and theology of Taoist Thunder Magic.

sources.author: Benn, James A.
sources.work: Tepping at Thunder: Some Notes on the Taoist Ritual Master
sources.description: Discusses the role and training of Taoist ritual masters specializing in Thunder Magic.
